creator: mi@privatelabs.com
text:
This changes do the following things:
		. make use of the (now latest) Tcl-8.3
		. update the MASTER_SITES
		. make the software actually use some of the Tcl-8.3
		  features (which is why patch-aa grew so much) --
		  especially -- get rid of most of the direct references
		  to interp->result; more should be done here...
